---
title: "pheast_Covid"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Load data & Filtering

-   Used Covid dataset that had

```{r}
library(HDF5Array)
library(rhdf5)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(zellkonverter)
pbmc_sce <- readH5AD(
  "15f16d33-19c9-4d77-8ba5-62c337a1f3ae/cxg_PBMCs.h5ad",
  use_hdf5 = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
colnames(colData(pbmc_sce))

grep(
  "age|development|disease|health|status|donor|subject|child|pediatric",
  colnames(colData(pbmc_sce)),
  ignore.case = TRUE,
  value = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
table(colData(pbmc_sce)$development_stage, useNA = "ifany")
table(colData(pbmc_sce)$disease, useNA = "ifany")
table(colData(pbmc_sce)$COVID_status, useNA = "ifany")
table(colData(pbmc_sce)$Group, useNA = "ifany")
table(colData(pbmc_sce)$tissue, useNA = "ifany")
```

```{r}
meta <- colData(pbmc_sce)

pbmc_ped_healthy <- pbmc_sce[
  ,
  meta$development_stage %in% c(
    "2-5 year-old child stage",
    "6-12 year-old child stage",
    "adolescent stage",
    "infant stage",
    "newborn human stage"
  ) &
  meta$disease == "normal"
]
#pediatric healthy data filtered
```

```{r}
meta <- colData(pbmc_sce)

pbmc_ped_healthy <- pbmc_sce[
  ,
  meta$Group == "Paediatric" &
  meta$disease == "normal"
]
```

### **QC:**

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scuttle)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)

# ---- Identify mitochondrial genes ----
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  stop("No gene name column found in rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy).")
}

gene_names <- rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy)[[gene_col]]
is_mito <- grepl("^MT-", gene_names)

# ---- Compute QC metrics (handles 'X' vs 'counts') ----
pbmc_ped_healthy <- addPerCellQCMetrics(
  pbmc_ped_healthy,
  subsets = list(Mito = is_mito),
  assay.type = assayNames(pbmc_ped_healthy)[1]
)

qc <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy))

# ---- Visualize distributions ----
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
hist(qc$detected, breaks = 50, main = "Detected genes", xlab = "Detected")
hist(qc$sum, breaks = 50, main = "Total counts", xlab = "Counts")
hist(qc$subsets_Mito_percent, breaks = 50, main = "Mito %", xlab = "Percent")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

# ---- QC filter (PBMC-appropriate thresholds) ----
keep <- qc$detected >= 200 &
        qc$sum >= 500 &
        qc$subsets_Mito_percent <= 20

pbmc_ped_healthy_qc <- pbmc_ped_healthy[, keep]

# ---- Cell-level QC table ----
qc_df <- data.frame(
  patient_id = qc$patient_id,
  sample_id = qc$sample_id,
  development_stage = qc$development_stage,
  disease = qc$disease,
  cell_type = qc$cell_type,
  detected = qc$detected,
  total_counts = qc$sum,
  mito_percent = qc$subsets_Mito_percent,
  keep = keep,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# ---- Sample-level summary ----
sample_qc_df <- qc_df %>%
  group_by(sample_id, patient_id, development_stage, disease) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cells_before_qc = n(),
    n_cells_after_qc = sum(keep, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_detected = median(detected, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_counts = median(total_counts, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_mito = median(mito_percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---- Outputs ----
dim(qc_df)
head(qc_df)
head(sample_qc_df)
ncol(pbmc_ped_healthy)
ncol(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)
```

```{r}
library(Matrix)

expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")

# Check row/column metadata and object metadata for normalization clues
cat("Assay names:\n")
print(assayNames(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

cat("\nMetadata names:\n")
print(names(metadata(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)))

cat("\nFull metadata:\n")
print(metadata(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

cat("\nColumn metadata names:\n")
print(colnames(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)))

cat("\nRow metadata names:\n")
print(colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)))

# Check library sizes in X
x_sums <- Matrix::colSums(expr_mat)

cat("\nSummary of column sums in X:\n")
print(summary(x_sums))

cat("\nQuantiles of column sums in X:\n")
print(quantile(x_sums, probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.95, 0.99, 1), na.rm = TRUE))

# Check nonzero value distribution
set.seed(1)
gene_sample <- sample(seq_len(nrow(expr_mat)), min(1000, nrow(expr_mat)))
cell_sample <- sample(seq_len(ncol(expr_mat)), min(1000, ncol(expr_mat)))

vals <- as.vector(expr_mat[gene_sample, cell_sample])
vals_nonzero <- vals[vals > 0]

cat("\nNonzero value quantiles:\n")
print(quantile(vals_nonzero, probs = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1), na.rm = TRUE))
```

### **GRAPHS:**

#### Horizontal, Long Heatmap:

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

# Use X directly.
# This dataset's X assay is already normalized/transformed as:
# log(CPM/100 + 1), equivalent to log(counts per 10,000 + 1)
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")

# Gene names
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name", "name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) stop("No gene name column found.")

gene_names <- as.character(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]])

# Metadata
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

if (!"cell_type" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  stop("cell_type column not found in colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

# donor/sample column
donor_col <- intersect(
  c("patient_id", "donor_id", "sample_id", "sampleID"),
  colnames(meta)
)[1]

if (is.na(donor_col)) {
  stop("No donor/sample ID column found in metadata.")
}

# Keep valid cells
keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) & meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(meta[[donor_col]]) & meta[[donor_col]] != ""

meta <- meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

# Match genes
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) stop("None of the requested genes were found.")

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

# Use already-normalized X values directly
expr_sub <- expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# ------------------------------------
# Order detailed cell types by broad lineage
# ------------------------------------
cell_types <- unique(meta$cell_type)

cell_type_info <- data.frame(
  cell_type = cell_types,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- case_when(
  grepl("B cell|memory B|naive B|class switched", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B cells",
  grepl("plasma|plasmablast", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B lineage / plasma",
  grepl("T cell|CD4|CD8|Treg|regulatory T|alpha-beta T|gamma-delta T|MAIT|mucosal invariant T", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cells",
  grepl("natural killer|\\bNK\\b|innate lymphoid|\\bILC\\b", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK / ILC",
  grepl("monocyte|dendritic|granulocyte|myeloid", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
  grepl("hematopoietic precursor|HPC|progenitor|precursor", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitors",
  grepl("erythrocyte|RBC", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid",
  grepl("platelet", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Platelets",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

group_order <- c(
  "B cells",
  "B lineage / plasma",
  "T cells",
  "NK / ILC",
  "Myeloid",
  "Progenitors",
  "Erythroid",
  "Platelets",
  "Other"
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- factor(cell_type_info$cell_group, levels = group_order)

cell_type_info <- cell_type_info %>%
  arrange(cell_group, cell_type)

cell_types_ordered <- cell_type_info$cell_type

# Average expression by ordered detailed cell types
avg_mat <- sapply(cell_types_ordered, function(ct) {
  cols <- which(meta$cell_type == ct)
  Matrix::rowMeans(expr_sub[, cols, drop = FALSE])
})

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)
rownames(avg_mat) <- genes_present
colnames(avg_mat) <- cell_types_ordered

# donor count and cell count per detailed cell type
label_df <- meta %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(.data[[donor_col]]),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[match(cell_types_ordered, label_df$cell_type), ]

cell_type_labels <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_type,
  " (d = ",
  label_df$d,
  ", n = ",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

# Horizontal layout
heatmap_mat <- avg_mat
colnames(heatmap_mat) <- cell_type_labels

# Remove all-NA rows/cols if needed
heatmap_mat <- heatmap_mat[
  rowSums(is.na(heatmap_mat)) < ncol(heatmap_mat),
  colSums(is.na(heatmap_mat)) < nrow(heatmap_mat),
  drop = FALSE
]

if (exists("ht")) rm(ht)

# ------------------------------------
# Quantile-based legend/color scale
# ------------------------------------
legend_min <- 0
legend_max <- as.numeric(quantile(heatmap_mat, probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE))
legend_mid <- legend_max / 2

cat("99th percentile legend max:", legend_max, "\n")

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(legend_min, legend_mid, legend_max),
  c(
    "#2166AC",  # blue
    "#D0D0D0",  # gray midpoint
    "#B2182B"   # red
  )
)

legend_ticks <- pretty(c(legend_min, legend_max), n = 5)
legend_ticks <- legend_ticks[legend_ticks >= legend_min & legend_ticks <= legend_max]

ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,
  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = NA),

  # genes on y
  row_names_side = "left",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),

  # detailed cell types on x
  column_names_side = "bottom",
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
  column_names_rot = 90,

  width = unit(26, "cm"),
  height = unit(5.5, "cm"),

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)\n",
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    at = legend_ticks,
    labels = round(legend_ticks, 2),
    legend_height = unit(45, "mm")
  ),

  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    val <- heatmap_mat[i, j]

    lab <- if (val < 0.005) "0" else sprintf("%.2f", val)

    grid.text(
      lab,
      x, y,
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 6, col = "black")
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")

png(
  "pediatric_healthy_heatmap_horizontal_grouped_with_counts.png",
  width = 2700,
  height = 1700,
  res = 220
)

grid.newpage()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()
```

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

# Use X directly (already normalized/transformed)
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

# Find gene-name column
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name", "name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  stop("No usable gene name column found in rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

gene_names <- as.character(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]])

# Keep requested genes that are present
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) {
  stop("None of the requested genes were found in the dataset.")
}

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

# Use already-normalized X values directly
expr_sub <- expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# Build plotting dataframe
plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(expr_sub)))
plot_df$cell_type <- meta$cell_type

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(genes_present),
    names_to = "gene",
    values_to = "expression"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cell_type), cell_type != "") %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class = case_when(
      grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cell",
      grepl("natural killer|NK", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cell",
      grepl("B cell|plasma|plasmablast", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B / plasma",
      grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
      grepl("dendritic", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic",
      grepl("erythrocyte|platelet", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid / platelet",
      grepl("precursor|progenitor|HPC", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitor",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    cell_class = factor(
      cell_class,
      levels = c(
        "B / plasma",
        "Dendritic",
        "Erythroid / platelet",
        "Myeloid",
        "NK cell",
        "Progenitor",
        "T cell",
        "Other"
      )
    ),
    gene = factor(gene, levels = genes_to_plot)
  )

p_box_2 <- ggplot(plot_long, aes(x = cell_class, y = expression)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(color = "Boxplot"),
    fill = "white",
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width = 0.55,
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = "Cells"),
    width = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.08,
    size = 0.35
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Plot elements",
    values = c(
      "Boxplot" = "black",
      "Cells" = "#ff2ca3"
    )
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        alpha = c(1, 1),
        size = c(1, 2)
      )
    )
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ gene, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "CD24 and SIGLEC10 expression across broad blood cell classes",
    x = "Cell class",
    y = "Expression (log(CPM/100 + 1))"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_box_2

ggsave(
  filename = "CD24_SIGLEC10_boxplot_only.png",
  plot = p_box_2,
  width = 10,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

# Use X directly (already normalized/transformed)
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

# Find gene-name column
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name", "name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  stop("No usable gene name column found in rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

gene_names <- as.character(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]])

# Keep requested genes that are present
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) {
  stop("None of the requested genes were found in the dataset.")
}

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

# Use already-normalized X values directly
expr_sub <- expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# Build plotting dataframe
plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(expr_sub)))
plot_df$cell_type <- meta$cell_type

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(genes_present),
    names_to = "gene",
    values_to = "expression"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cell_type), cell_type != "") %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class = case_when(
      grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cell",
      grepl("natural killer|NK", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cell",
      grepl("B cell|plasma|plasmablast", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B / plasma",
      grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
      grepl("dendritic", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic",
      grepl("erythrocyte|platelet", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid / platelet",
      grepl("precursor|progenitor|HPC", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitor",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    cell_class = factor(
      cell_class,
      levels = c(
        "B / plasma",
        "Dendritic",
        "Erythroid / platelet",
        "Myeloid",
        "NK cell",
        "Progenitor",
        "T cell",
        "Other"
      )
    ),
    gene = factor(gene, levels = genes_to_plot)
  )

p_box_all <- ggplot(plot_long, aes(x = cell_class, y = expression)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(color = "Boxplot"),
    fill = "white",
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width = 0.55,
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = "Cells"),
    width = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.08,
    size = 0.35
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Plot elements",
    values = c(
      "Boxplot" = "black",
      "Cells" = "#ff2ca3"
    )
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        alpha = c(1, 1),
        size = c(1, 2)
      )
    )
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ gene, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Expression of candidate genes across broad blood cell classes",
    x = "Cell class",
    y = "Expression (log(CPM/100 + 1))"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_box_all

ggsave(
  filename = "appendix_all_genes_boxplot_fixed.png",
  plot = p_box_all,
  width = 12,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

# Use X directly (already normalized/transformed)
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

# Find gene-name column
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name", "name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  stop("No usable gene name column found in rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

gene_names <- as.character(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]])

# Keep requested genes that are present
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) {
  stop("None of the requested genes were found in the dataset.")
}

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

# Use already-normalized X values directly
expr_sub <- expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# Build plotting dataframe
plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(expr_sub)))
plot_df$cell_type <- meta$cell_type

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(genes_present),
    names_to = "gene",
    values_to = "expression"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cell_type), cell_type != "") %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class = case_when(
      grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cell",
      grepl("natural killer|NK", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cell",
      grepl("B cell|plasma|plasmablast", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B / plasma",
      grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
      grepl("dendritic", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic",
      grepl("erythrocyte|platelet", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid / platelet",
      grepl("precursor|progenitor|HPC", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitor",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    cell_class = factor(
      cell_class,
      levels = c(
        "B / plasma",
        "Dendritic",
        "Erythroid / platelet",
        "Myeloid",
        "NK cell",
        "Progenitor",
        "T cell",
        "Other"
      )
    ),
    gene = factor(gene, levels = genes_to_plot)
  )

p_violin_2 <- ggplot(plot_long, aes(x = cell_class, y = expression)) +
  geom_violin(
    aes(fill = "Violin"),
    color = "black",
    trim = TRUE,
    scale = "width",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = "Cells"),
    width = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.08,
    size = 0.35
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Plot elements",
    values = c("Violin" = "white")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Plot elements",
    values = c("Cells" = "#ff2ca3")
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(order = 1, override.aes = list(color = "black")),
    color = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(alpha = 1, size = 2))
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ gene, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "CD24 and SIGLEC10 expression across broad blood cell classes",
    x = "Cell class",
    y = "Expression (log(CPM/100 + 1))"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_violin_2

ggsave(
  filename = "CD24_SIGLEC10_violin_only.png",
  plot = p_violin_2,
  width = 10,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

#### Broad Cell Type Heatmap:

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

# Use X directly.
# Based on the paper/methods context, X appears already normalized as:
# log(CPM/100 + 1), equivalent to log(counts per 10,000 + 1)
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")

# Gene names
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) stop("No gene name column found.")

gene_names <- rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]]

# Metadata
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

# Keep cells with valid cell type and donor id
keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) & meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(meta$patient_id) & meta$patient_id != ""

meta <- meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

# Define broad cell classes
meta <- meta %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class = case_when(
      grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cell",
      grepl("natural killer|NK", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cell",
      grepl("B cell|plasma|plasmablast", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B / plasma",
      grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
      grepl("dendritic", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic",
      grepl("erythrocyte|platelet", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid / platelet",
      grepl("precursor", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitor",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

# Keep requested genes that are present
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) stop("None of the requested genes were found.")

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

# Use already-normalized X values directly
# Do NOT do CPM normalization or log transform again
expr_sub <- expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# Average expression by broad cell class
cell_classes <- c(
  "B / plasma",
  "Dendritic",
  "Erythroid / platelet",
  "Myeloid",
  "NK cell",
  "Progenitor",
  "T cell",
  "Other"
)

cell_classes <- cell_classes[cell_classes %in% unique(meta$cell_class)]

avg_mat <- sapply(cell_classes, function(cc) {
  cols <- which(meta$cell_class == cc)
  Matrix::rowMeans(expr_sub[, cols, drop = FALSE])
})

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)
rownames(avg_mat) <- genes_present
colnames(avg_mat) <- cell_classes

# Rows = broad cell classes
heatmap_mat <- t(avg_mat)

# Donor count (d) and cell count (n) by broad class
label_df <- meta %>%
  group_by(cell_class) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(patient_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[match(rownames(heatmap_mat), label_df$cell_class), ]

rownames(heatmap_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_class,
  " (d = ",
  label_df$d,
  ", n = ",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

# Remove old heatmap if it exists
if (exists("ht")) rm(ht)

# ------------------------------------
# Quantile-based color scale
# Use 99th percentile to bring the max lower
# ------------------------------------
legend_min <- 0
legend_max <- as.numeric(quantile(heatmap_mat, probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE))
legend_mid <- legend_max / 2

cat("99th percentile legend max:", legend_max, "\n")

# Lighter blue, gray midpoint, red high
col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(legend_min, legend_mid, legend_max),
  c(
    "#2166AC",
    "#D0D0D0",
    "#B2182B"
  )
)

legend_ticks <- pretty(c(legend_min, legend_max), n = 5)
legend_ticks <- legend_ticks[legend_ticks >= legend_min & legend_ticks <= legend_max]

# Heatmap
ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,
  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = NA),
  row_names_side = "left",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
  row_names_max_width = unit(10, "cm"),
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)\n",
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    at = legend_ticks,
    labels = round(legend_ticks, 2),
    legend_height = unit(55, "mm"),
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 13, fontface = "bold"),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11)
  ),
  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    val <- heatmap_mat[i, j]

    lab <- if (val < 0.005) {
      "0"
    } else {
      sprintf("%.2f", val)
    }

    grid.text(
      lab,
      x, y,
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, col = "black")
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")

png(
  "pediatric_healthy_heatmap_broad_classes_quantile99.png",
  width = 3600,
  height = 2400,
  res = 300
)

grid.newpage()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()
```

#### Vertical, Long Heatmap:

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

# Use X directly.
# This dataset's X assay is already normalized/transformed as:
# log(CPM/100 + 1), equivalent to log(counts per 10,000 + 1)
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")

# Gene names
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name", "name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) stop("No gene name column found.")

gene_names <- as.character(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]])

# Metadata
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

if (!"cell_type" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  stop("cell_type column not found in colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

# donor/sample column
donor_col <- intersect(
  c("patient_id", "donor_id", "sample_id", "sampleID"),
  colnames(meta)
)[1]

if (is.na(donor_col)) {
  stop("No donor/sample ID column found in metadata.")
}

# Keep valid cells
keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) & meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(meta[[donor_col]]) & meta[[donor_col]] != ""

meta <- meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

# Match genes
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) stop("None of the requested genes were found.")

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

# Use already-normalized X values directly
expr_sub <- expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# ------------------------------------
# Order detailed cell types by broad lineage
# ------------------------------------
cell_types <- unique(meta$cell_type)

cell_type_info <- data.frame(
  cell_type = cell_types,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- case_when(
  grepl("B cell|memory B|naive B|class switched", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B cells",
  grepl("plasma|plasmablast", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B lineage / plasma",
  grepl("T cell|CD4|CD8|Treg|regulatory T|alpha-beta T|gamma-delta T|MAIT|mucosal invariant T", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cells",
  grepl("natural killer|\\bNK\\b|innate lymphoid|\\bILC\\b", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK / ILC",
  grepl("monocyte|dendritic|granulocyte|myeloid", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
  grepl("hematopoietic precursor|HPC|progenitor|precursor", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitors",
  grepl("erythrocyte|RBC", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid",
  grepl("platelet", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Platelets",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

group_order <- c(
  "B cells",
  "B lineage / plasma",
  "T cells",
  "NK / ILC",
  "Myeloid",
  "Progenitors",
  "Erythroid",
  "Platelets",
  "Other"
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- factor(cell_type_info$cell_group, levels = group_order)

cell_type_info <- cell_type_info %>%
  arrange(cell_group, cell_type)

cell_types_ordered <- cell_type_info$cell_type

# Average expression by ordered detailed cell types
avg_mat <- sapply(cell_types_ordered, function(ct) {
  cols <- which(meta$cell_type == ct)
  Matrix::rowMeans(expr_sub[, cols, drop = FALSE])
})

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)
rownames(avg_mat) <- genes_present
colnames(avg_mat) <- cell_types_ordered

# donor count and cell count per detailed cell type
label_df <- meta %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(.data[[donor_col]]),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[match(cell_types_ordered, label_df$cell_type), ]

cell_type_labels <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_type,
  " (d = ",
  label_df$d,
  ", n = ",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

# Vertical layout
heatmap_mat <- t(avg_mat)
rownames(heatmap_mat) <- cell_type_labels

# Remove all-NA rows/cols if needed
heatmap_mat <- heatmap_mat[
  rowSums(is.na(heatmap_mat)) < ncol(heatmap_mat),
  colSums(is.na(heatmap_mat)) < nrow(heatmap_mat),
  drop = FALSE
]

if (exists("ht")) rm(ht)

# ------------------------------------
# Quantile-based legend/color scale
# ------------------------------------
legend_min <- 0
legend_max <- as.numeric(quantile(heatmap_mat, probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE))
legend_mid <- legend_max / 2

cat("99th percentile legend max:", legend_max, "\n")

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(legend_min, legend_mid, legend_max),
  c(
    "#2166AC",  # blue
    "#D0D0D0",  # gray midpoint
    "#B2182B"   # red
  )
)

legend_ticks <- pretty(c(legend_min, legend_max), n = 5)
legend_ticks <- legend_ticks[legend_ticks >= legend_min & legend_ticks <= legend_max]

ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,
  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = NA),

  # detailed cell types on y
  row_names_side = "left",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
  row_names_max_width = unit(11, "cm"),

  # genes on x
  column_names_side = "bottom",
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
  column_names_rot = 45,

  width = unit(8, "cm"),
  height = unit(22, "cm"),

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)\n",
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    at = legend_ticks,
    labels = round(legend_ticks, 2),
    legend_height = unit(45, "mm")
  ),

  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    val <- heatmap_mat[i, j]

    lab <- if (val < 0.005) "0" else sprintf("%.2f", val)

    grid.text(
      lab,
      x, y,
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 6, col = "black")
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")

png(
  "pediatric_healthy_heatmap_vertical_grouped_with_counts.png",
  width = 2300,
  height = 2300,
  res = 220
)

grid.newpage()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# -----------------------------
# Broad grouped cell-type labels
# -----------------------------
seu$broad_cell_type <- case_when(
  grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cells",
  grepl("natural killer|NK", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cells",
  grepl("B cell|plasma|plasmablast", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B / plasma cells",
  grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid cells",
  grepl("dendritic", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic cells",
  grepl("erythrocyte|platelet", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Platelet / erythroid",
  grepl("precursor", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitors",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

Idents(seu) <- seu$broad_cell_type

# -----------------------------
# CD24 UMAP with broad labels
# -----------------------------
p_cd24 <- FeaturePlot(
  seu,
  features = "CD24",
  reduction = "umap",
  raster = FALSE
) +
  ggtitle("CD24 expression") +
  theme_classic()

p_cd24 <- LabelClusters(
  plot = p_cd24,
  id = "ident",
  repel = TRUE,
  size = 5
)

# -----------------------------
# SIGLEC10 UMAP with broad labels
# -----------------------------
p_siglec10 <- FeaturePlot(
  seu,
  features = "SIGLEC10",
  reduction = "umap",
  raster = FALSE
) +
  ggtitle("SIGLEC10 expression") +
  theme_classic()

p_siglec10 <- LabelClusters(
  plot = p_siglec10,
  id = "ident",
  repel = TRUE,
  size = 5
)

# -----------------------------
# Show separately
# -----------------------------
p_cd24
p_siglec10

# -----------------------------
# Save separately
# -----------------------------
ggsave("UMAP_CD24_broad_labels.png", plot = p_cd24, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("UMAP_SIGLEC10_broad_labels.png", plot = p_siglec10, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

# use X as the count-like matrix
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")

# gene names
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) stop("No gene name column found.")

gene_names <- rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]]

# metadata
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

# keep cells with valid cell type and donor id
keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) & meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(meta$patient_id) & meta$patient_id != ""

meta <- meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

# define broad cell classes
meta <- meta %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class = case_when(
      grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cell",
      grepl("natural killer|NK", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cell",
      grepl("B cell|plasma|plasmablast", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B / plasma",
      grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
      grepl("dendritic", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic",
      grepl("erythrocyte|platelet", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid / platelet",
      grepl("precursor", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitor",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

# keep requested genes that are present
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) stop("Neither CD24 nor SIGLEC10 was found.")

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

# compute single-cell log2(CPM + 1)
lib_sizes <- Matrix::colSums(expr_mat)
cpm_mat <- t(t(expr_mat) / lib_sizes) * 1e6
logcpm_mat <- log2(cpm_mat + 1)

expr_sub <- logcpm_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# order of broad cell classes
cell_classes <- c(
  "B / plasma", "Dendritic", "Erythroid / platelet",
  "Myeloid", "NK cell", "Progenitor", "T cell", "Other"
)
cell_classes <- cell_classes[cell_classes %in% unique(meta$cell_class)]

# average expression by broad cell class
avg_mat <- sapply(cell_classes, function(cc) {
  cols <- which(meta$cell_class == cc)
  Matrix::rowMeans(expr_sub[, cols, drop = FALSE])
})

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)
rownames(avg_mat) <- genes_present
colnames(avg_mat) <- cell_classes

# donor count (d) and cell count (n) by broad class
label_df <- meta %>%
  group_by(cell_class) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(patient_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[match(colnames(avg_mat), label_df$cell_class), ]

colnames(avg_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_class,
  " (d = ",
  label_df$d,
  ", n = ",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

# this is already "horizontal":
# rows = genes, columns = cell classes
heatmap_mat <- avg_mat

# color scale
col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(min(heatmap_mat, na.rm = TRUE),
    median(heatmap_mat, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(heatmap_mat, na.rm = TRUE)),
  c("#2166AC", "#F7F7F7", "#B2182B")
)

# heatmap
ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,
  name = "Mean expression\n(log2(CPM + 1))",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = NA),

  # genes on y-axis
  row_names_side = "left",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold"),

  # cell classes on x-axis
  column_names_side = "bottom",
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  column_names_rot = 45,

  width = unit(12, "cm"),
  height = unit(2.8, "cm"),

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Mean expression\n(log2(CPM + 1))",
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    legend_height = unit(40, "mm")
  ),

  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    grid.text(
      sprintf("%.3f", heatmap_mat[i, j]),
      x, y,
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, col = "black")
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")

png("pediatric_healthy_heatmap_CD24_SIGLEC10_horizontal.png",
    width = 2200, height = 900, res = 200)
grid.newpage()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()
```

### **UMAP:**

Updated UMAP:

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
library(scales)

set.seed(123)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

# =========================================================
# 1. Load expression + metadata from QC-filtered object
# =========================================================
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

if (!"cell_type" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  stop("cell_type column not found in colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

# =========================================================
# 2. Use gene symbols as row names
# =========================================================
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name", "name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  stop("No gene name column found in rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

gene_names <- as.character(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]])

if (length(gene_names) != nrow(expr_mat)) {
  stop("gene_names length does not match number of rows in expr_mat.")
}

rownames(expr_mat) <- make.unique(gene_names)

# =========================================================
# 3. Keep cells with valid cell type annotation
# =========================================================
keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) & meta$cell_type != ""

meta <- meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

# =========================================================
# 4. Downsample for speed
# =========================================================
n_umap_cells <- min(50000, ncol(expr_mat))

set.seed(123)
cells_use <- sample(seq_len(ncol(expr_mat)), n_umap_cells)

expr_use <- expr_mat[, cells_use, drop = FALSE]
meta_use <- meta[cells_use, , drop = FALSE]

rownames(meta_use) <- colnames(expr_use)
expr_use <- as(expr_use, "dgCMatrix")

cat("Cells used for UMAP:", ncol(expr_use), "\n")

# =========================================================
# 5. Check genes
# =========================================================
genes_present <- intersect(genes_to_plot, rownames(expr_use))

if (length(genes_present) == 0) {
  stop("None of the requested genes were found in the matrix.")
}

cat("Genes found:\n")
print(genes_present)

cat("\nGenes missing:\n")
print(setdiff(genes_to_plot, genes_present))

# =========================================================
# 6. Build Seurat object
# IMPORTANT:
# X already appears normalized/transformed, so do NOT
# run NormalizeData() again.
# =========================================================
seu <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = expr_use,
  meta.data = meta_use,
  project = "Pediatric_Blood"
)

DefaultAssay(seu) <- "RNA"

# Put already-normalized X values into the data slot/layer
seu <- tryCatch(
  {
    SetAssayData(seu, assay = "RNA", layer = "data", new.data = expr_use)
  },
  error = function(e) {
    SetAssayData(seu, assay = "RNA", slot = "data", new.data = expr_use)
  }
)

# =========================================================
# 7. Broad grouped cell-type labels
#    B vs Plasma split
#    Platelets vs Erythroid split
# =========================================================
seu$broad_cell_type <- case_when(
  grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cells",
  grepl("natural killer|NK", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cells",
  grepl("plasma|plasmablast", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Plasma cells",
  grepl("B cell", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B cells",
  grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid cells",
  grepl("dendritic", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic cells",
  grepl("platelet", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Platelets",
  grepl("erythrocyte|RBC", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid cells",
  grepl("precursor|progenitor|HPC", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitors",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

seu$broad_cell_type <- factor(
  seu$broad_cell_type,
  levels = c(
    "T cells",
    "NK cells",
    "B cells",
    "Plasma cells",
    "Myeloid cells",
    "Dendritic cells",
    "Platelets",
    "Erythroid cells",
    "Progenitors",
    "Other"
  )
)

# =========================================================
# 8. Broad cell population colors
# =========================================================
celltype_palette <- c(
  "T cells" = "#6A51A3",          # purple
  "NK cells" = "#9ECAE1",         # light blue
  "B cells" = "#31A354",          # green
  "Plasma cells" = "#66C2A4",     # teal-green
  "Myeloid cells" = "#E67E22",    # orange
  "Dendritic cells" = "#A1D99B",  # pale green
  "Platelets" = "#B39DDB",        # lilac
  "Erythroid cells" = "#4C78A8",  # blue
  "Progenitors" = "#F2C94C",      # yellow
  "Other" = "#BDBDBD"             # gray
)

# =========================================================
# 9. Slide-style workflow:
# variable features -> PCA -> neighbors -> cluster -> UMAP
# =========================================================
seu <- FindVariableFeatures(
  seu,
  selection.method = "vst",
  nfeatures = 2000,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- ScaleData(
  seu,
  features = VariableFeatures(seu),
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- RunPCA(
  seu,
  features = VariableFeatures(seu),
  npcs = 30,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- FindNeighbors(
  seu,
  dims = 1:30,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- FindClusters(
  seu,
  resolution = 0.4,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- RunUMAP(
  seu,
  dims = 1:30,
  reduction = "pca",
  reduction.name = "umap",
  verbose = FALSE
)

# =========================================================
# 10. Prepare dataframe for left UMAP
# =========================================================
umap_df <- Embeddings(seu, "umap") %>%
  as.data.frame()

colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP_1", "UMAP_2")
umap_df$cell <- rownames(umap_df)
umap_df$broad_cell_type <- seu$broad_cell_type[rownames(umap_df)]

label_df <- umap_df %>%
  group_by(broad_cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    UMAP_1 = median(UMAP_1, na.rm = TRUE),
    UMAP_2 = median(UMAP_2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ranges for padding and manual label placement
x_range <- range(umap_df$UMAP_1, na.rm = TRUE)
y_range <- range(umap_df$UMAP_2, na.rm = TRUE)
x_span <- diff(x_range)
y_span <- diff(y_range)

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(
    label_x = case_when(
      broad_cell_type == "Progenitors" ~ UMAP_1 + 0.12 * x_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Platelets" ~ UMAP_1 + 0.08 * x_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Erythroid cells" ~ UMAP_1 + 0.09 * x_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Plasma cells" ~ UMAP_1 - 0.02 * x_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Dendritic cells" ~ UMAP_1 - 0.02 * x_span,
      TRUE ~ UMAP_1
    ),
    label_y = case_when(
      broad_cell_type == "Platelets" ~ UMAP_2 + 0.055 * y_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Erythroid cells" ~ UMAP_2 - 0.045 * y_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Dendritic cells" ~ UMAP_2 - 0.035 * y_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Myeloid cells" ~ UMAP_2 + 0.02 * y_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Other" ~ UMAP_2 - 0.03 * y_span,
      TRUE ~ UMAP_2
    )
  )

# extra plotting space so text does not get cut off
x_limits <- c(x_range[1] - 0.04 * x_span, x_range[2] + 0.22 * x_span)
y_limits <- c(y_range[1] - 0.06 * y_span, y_range[2] + 0.08 * y_span)

# =========================================================
# 11. Left plot: broad cell populations
#    colored text + white label background
# =========================================================
p_labels <- ggplot(
  umap_df,
  aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2, color = broad_cell_type)
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.28, alpha = 0.9, show.legend = FALSE) +
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
    data = label_df,
    aes(
      x = label_x,
      y = label_y,
      label = broad_cell_type,
      color = broad_cell_type
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.88),
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4.4,
    label.size = 0,
    box.padding = 0.30,
    point.padding = 0.15,
    segment.color = NA,
    show.legend = FALSE,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    seed = 123
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = celltype_palette) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = x_limits,
    ylim = y_limits,
    clip = "off"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Cell populations",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.6, color = "black"),
    plot.margin = margin(12, 32, 12, 12),
    aspect.ratio = 1
  )

# =========================================================
# 12. Right plots: gene expression on same UMAP
# =========================================================
feature_plots <- lapply(genes_present, function(g) {
  FeaturePlot(
    seu,
    features = g,
    reduction = "umap",
    raster = FALSE,
    order = TRUE,
    cols = c("#fde5f3", "#ff2ca3")
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient(
      low = "#fde5f3",
      high = "#ff2ca3",
      name = "Expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(
      xlim = x_limits,
      ylim = y_limits,
      clip = "off"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = g,
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "black"),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8),
      aspect.ratio = 1
    )
})

# =========================================================
# 13. Combine plots
# =========================================================
right_panel <- wrap_plots(feature_plots, ncol = 3)

final_umap_plot <- p_labels + right_panel + plot_layout(widths = c(1.18, 1.82))

final_umap_plot

# =========================================================
# 14. Save
# =========================================================
ggsave(
  filename = "pediatric_blood_umap_split_color_coded.png",
  plot = final_umap_plot,
  width = 16.5,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300
)
```

Different Type of labels:

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(shadowtext)

set.seed(123)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

# =========================================================
# 1. Load expression + metadata from QC-filtered object
# =========================================================
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

if (!"cell_type" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  stop("cell_type column not found in colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

# =========================================================
# 2. Use gene symbols as row names
# =========================================================
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name", "name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  stop("No gene name column found in rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

gene_names <- as.character(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]])

if (length(gene_names) != nrow(expr_mat)) {
  stop("gene_names length does not match number of rows in expr_mat.")
}

rownames(expr_mat) <- make.unique(gene_names)

# =========================================================
# 3. Keep cells with valid cell type annotation
# =========================================================
keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) & meta$cell_type != ""

meta <- meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

# =========================================================
# 4. Downsample for speed
# =========================================================
n_umap_cells <- min(50000, ncol(expr_mat))

set.seed(123)
cells_use <- sample(seq_len(ncol(expr_mat)), n_umap_cells)

expr_use <- expr_mat[, cells_use, drop = FALSE]
meta_use <- meta[cells_use, , drop = FALSE]

rownames(meta_use) <- colnames(expr_use)
expr_use <- as(expr_use, "dgCMatrix")

cat("Cells used for UMAP:", ncol(expr_use), "\n")

# =========================================================
# 5. Check genes
# =========================================================
genes_present <- intersect(genes_to_plot, rownames(expr_use))

if (length(genes_present) == 0) {
  stop("None of the requested genes were found in the matrix.")
}

cat("Genes found:\n")
print(genes_present)

cat("\nGenes missing:\n")
print(setdiff(genes_to_plot, genes_present))

# =========================================================
# 6. Build Seurat object
# IMPORTANT:
# X already appears normalized/transformed, so do NOT
# run NormalizeData() again.
# =========================================================
seu <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = expr_use,
  meta.data = meta_use,
  project = "Pediatric_Blood"
)

DefaultAssay(seu) <- "RNA"

# Put already-normalized X values into the data slot/layer
seu <- tryCatch(
  {
    SetAssayData(seu, assay = "RNA", layer = "data", new.data = expr_use)
  },
  error = function(e) {
    SetAssayData(seu, assay = "RNA", slot = "data", new.data = expr_use)
  }
)

# =========================================================
# 7. Broad grouped cell-type labels
#    B vs Plasma split
#    Platelets vs Erythroid split
# =========================================================
seu$broad_cell_type <- case_when(
  grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cells",
  grepl("natural killer|NK", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cells",
  grepl("plasma|plasmablast", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Plasma cells",
  grepl("B cell", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B cells",
  grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid cells",
  grepl("dendritic", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic cells",
  grepl("platelet", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Platelets",
  grepl("erythrocyte|RBC", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid cells",
  grepl("precursor|progenitor|HPC", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitors",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

seu$broad_cell_type <- factor(
  seu$broad_cell_type,
  levels = c(
    "T cells",
    "NK cells",
    "B cells",
    "Plasma cells",
    "Myeloid cells",
    "Dendritic cells",
    "Platelets",
    "Erythroid cells",
    "Progenitors",
    "Other"
  )
)

# =========================================================
# 8. Broad cell population colors
# =========================================================
celltype_palette <- c(
  "T cells" = "#6A51A3",
  "NK cells" = "#9ECAE1",
  "B cells" = "#31A354",
  "Plasma cells" = "#66C2A4",
  "Myeloid cells" = "#E67E22",
  "Dendritic cells" = "#A1D99B",
  "Platelets" = "#B39DDB",
  "Erythroid cells" = "#4C78A8",
  "Progenitors" = "#F2C94C",
  "Other" = "#BDBDBD"
)

# =========================================================
# 9. Slide-style workflow:
# variable features -> PCA -> neighbors -> cluster -> UMAP
# =========================================================
seu <- FindVariableFeatures(
  seu,
  selection.method = "vst",
  nfeatures = 2000,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- ScaleData(
  seu,
  features = VariableFeatures(seu),
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- RunPCA(
  seu,
  features = VariableFeatures(seu),
  npcs = 30,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- FindNeighbors(
  seu,
  dims = 1:30,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- FindClusters(
  seu,
  resolution = 0.4,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- RunUMAP(
  seu,
  dims = 1:30,
  reduction = "pca",
  reduction.name = "umap",
  verbose = FALSE
)

# =========================================================
# 10. Prepare dataframe for left UMAP
# =========================================================
umap_df <- Embeddings(seu, "umap") %>%
  as.data.frame()

colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP_1", "UMAP_2")
umap_df$cell <- rownames(umap_df)
umap_df$broad_cell_type <- seu$broad_cell_type[rownames(umap_df)]

label_df <- umap_df %>%
  group_by(broad_cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    UMAP_1 = median(UMAP_1, na.rm = TRUE),
    UMAP_2 = median(UMAP_2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ranges for padding and manual label placement
x_range <- range(umap_df$UMAP_1, na.rm = TRUE)
y_range <- range(umap_df$UMAP_2, na.rm = TRUE)
x_span <- diff(x_range)
y_span <- diff(y_range)

# manually separate labels
# Progenitors moved DOWN into the empty space
label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(
    label_x = case_when(
      broad_cell_type == "Progenitors"     ~ UMAP_1 + 0.22 * x_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Platelets"       ~ UMAP_1 + 0.08 * x_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Erythroid cells" ~ UMAP_1 + 0.12 * x_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Plasma cells"    ~ UMAP_1 - 0.03 * x_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Dendritic cells" ~ UMAP_1 - 0.03 * x_span,
      TRUE ~ UMAP_1
    ),
    label_y = case_when(
      broad_cell_type == "Progenitors"     ~ UMAP_2 + 0.12 * y_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Platelets"       ~ UMAP_2 - 0.12 * y_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Erythroid cells" ~ UMAP_2 - 0.06 * y_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Dendritic cells" ~ UMAP_2 - 0.04 * y_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Myeloid cells"   ~ UMAP_2 + 0.02 * y_span,
      broad_cell_type == "Other"           ~ UMAP_2 - 0.03 * y_span,
      TRUE ~ UMAP_2
    )
  )

# extra plotting space so labels do not get cut off
x_limits <- c(x_range[1] - 0.04 * x_span, x_range[2] + 0.35 * x_span)
y_limits <- c(y_range[1] - 0.10 * y_span, y_range[2] + 0.14 * y_span)

# =========================================================
# 11. Left plot: broad cell populations
#    colored text + white shadow/halo
# =========================================================
p_labels <- ggplot(
  umap_df,
  aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2, color = broad_cell_type)
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.28, alpha = 0.9, show.legend = FALSE) +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = label_df,
    aes(
      x = label_x,
      y = label_y,
      label = broad_cell_type,
      color = broad_cell_type
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    bg.color = "white",
    bg.r = 0.20,
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4.6,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = celltype_palette) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = x_limits,
    ylim = y_limits,
    clip = "off"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Cell populations",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.6, color = "black"),
    plot.margin = margin(12, 40, 12, 12),
    aspect.ratio = 1
  )

# =========================================================
# 12. Right plots: gene expression on same UMAP
# =========================================================
feature_plots <- lapply(genes_present, function(g) {
  FeaturePlot(
    seu,
    features = g,
    reduction = "umap",
    raster = FALSE,
    order = TRUE,
    cols = c("#fde5f3", "#ff2ca3")
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient(
      low = "#fde5f3",
      high = "#ff2ca3",
      name = "Expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(
      xlim = x_limits,
      ylim = y_limits,
      clip = "off"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = g,
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "black"),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8),
      aspect.ratio = 1
    )
})

# =========================================================
# 13. Combine plots
# =========================================================
right_panel <- wrap_plots(feature_plots, ncol = 3)

final_umap_plot <- p_labels + right_panel + plot_layout(widths = c(1.18, 1.82))

final_umap_plot

# =========================================================
# 14. Save
# =========================================================
ggsave(
  filename = "pediatric_blood_umap_shadowtext.png",
  plot = final_umap_plot,
  width = 16.5,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300
)
```

UMAP 3 - w/ repel away

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
library(scales)

set.seed(123)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

# =========================================================
# 1. Load expression + metadata from QC-filtered object
# =========================================================
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

if (!"cell_type" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  stop("cell_type column not found in colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

# =========================================================
# 2. Use gene symbols as row names
# =========================================================
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name", "name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  stop("No gene name column found in rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

gene_names <- as.character(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]])

if (length(gene_names) != nrow(expr_mat)) {
  stop("gene_names length does not match number of rows in expr_mat.")
}

rownames(expr_mat) <- make.unique(gene_names)

# =========================================================
# 3. Keep cells with valid cell type annotation
# =========================================================
keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) & meta$cell_type != ""

meta <- meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

# =========================================================
# 4. Downsample for speed
# =========================================================
n_umap_cells <- min(50000, ncol(expr_mat))

set.seed(123)
cells_use <- sample(seq_len(ncol(expr_mat)), n_umap_cells)

expr_use <- expr_mat[, cells_use, drop = FALSE]
meta_use <- meta[cells_use, , drop = FALSE]

rownames(meta_use) <- colnames(expr_use)
expr_use <- as(expr_use, "dgCMatrix")

cat("Cells used for UMAP:", ncol(expr_use), "\n")

# =========================================================
# 5. Check genes
# =========================================================
genes_present <- intersect(genes_to_plot, rownames(expr_use))

if (length(genes_present) == 0) {
  stop("None of the requested genes were found in the matrix.")
}

cat("Genes found:\n")
print(genes_present)

cat("\nGenes missing:\n")
print(setdiff(genes_to_plot, genes_present))

# =========================================================
# 6. Build Seurat object
# IMPORTANT:
# X already appears normalized/transformed, so do NOT
# run NormalizeData() again.
# =========================================================
seu <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = expr_use,
  meta.data = meta_use,
  project = "Pediatric_Blood"
)

DefaultAssay(seu) <- "RNA"

seu <- tryCatch(
  {
    SetAssayData(seu, assay = "RNA", layer = "data", new.data = expr_use)
  },
  error = function(e) {
    SetAssayData(seu, assay = "RNA", slot = "data", new.data = expr_use)
  }
)

# =========================================================
# 7. Broad grouped cell-type labels
#    B vs Plasma split
#    Platelets vs Erythroid split
# =========================================================
seu$broad_cell_type <- case_when(
  grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cells",
  grepl("natural killer|NK", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cells",
  grepl("plasma|plasmablast", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Plasma cells",
  grepl("B cell", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B cells",
  grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid cells",
  grepl("dendritic", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic cells",
  grepl("platelet", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Platelets",
  grepl("erythrocyte|RBC", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid cells",
  grepl("precursor|progenitor|HPC", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitors",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

seu$broad_cell_type <- factor(
  seu$broad_cell_type,
  levels = c(
    "T cells",
    "NK cells",
    "B cells",
    "Plasma cells",
    "Myeloid cells",
    "Dendritic cells",
    "Platelets",
    "Erythroid cells",
    "Progenitors",
    "Other"
  )
)

# =========================================================
# 8. Broad cell population colors
# =========================================================
celltype_palette <- c(
  "T cells" = "#6A51A3",
  "NK cells" = "#9ECAE1",
  "B cells" = "#31A354",
  "Plasma cells" = "#66C2A4",
  "Myeloid cells" = "#E67E22",
  "Dendritic cells" = "#A1D99B",
  "Platelets" = "#B39DDB",
  "Erythroid cells" = "#4C78A8",
  "Progenitors" = "#F2C94C",
  "Other" = "#BDBDBD"
)

# =========================================================
# 9. Slide-style workflow:
# variable features -> PCA -> neighbors -> cluster -> UMAP
# =========================================================
seu <- FindVariableFeatures(
  seu,
  selection.method = "vst",
  nfeatures = 2000,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- ScaleData(
  seu,
  features = VariableFeatures(seu),
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- RunPCA(
  seu,
  features = VariableFeatures(seu),
  npcs = 30,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- FindNeighbors(
  seu,
  dims = 1:30,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- FindClusters(
  seu,
  resolution = 0.4,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- RunUMAP(
  seu,
  dims = 1:30,
  reduction = "pca",
  reduction.name = "umap",
  verbose = FALSE
)

# =========================================================
# 10. Prepare dataframe for plotting
# =========================================================
umap_df <- Embeddings(seu, "umap") %>%
  as.data.frame()

colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP_1", "UMAP_2")
umap_df$cell <- rownames(umap_df)
umap_df$broad_cell_type <- seu$broad_cell_type[rownames(umap_df)]

label_df <- umap_df %>%
  group_by(broad_cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    UMAP_1 = median(UMAP_1, na.rm = TRUE),
    UMAP_2 = median(UMAP_2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# =========================================================
# 11. Expand plot limits so labels do not get cut off
# =========================================================
x_range <- range(umap_df$UMAP_1, na.rm = TRUE)
y_range <- range(umap_df$UMAP_2, na.rm = TRUE)
x_span <- diff(x_range)
y_span <- diff(y_range)

# Give extra room on all sides, especially right/top for repelled labels
x_limits <- c(x_range[1] - 0.12 * x_span, x_range[2] + 0.38 * x_span)
y_limits <- c(y_range[1] - 0.12 * y_span, y_range[2] + 0.20 * y_span)

# =========================================================
# 12. Left plot: broad cell populations with ggrepel
#     labels moved away so clusters stay visible
# =========================================================
p_labels <- ggplot(
  umap_df,
  aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2, color = broad_cell_type)
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.28, alpha = 0.9, show.legend = FALSE) +
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
    data = label_df,
    aes(
      x = UMAP_1,
      y = UMAP_2,
      label = broad_cell_type,
      color = broad_cell_type
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = alpha("white", 0.92),
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 5,
    label.size = 0,
    box.padding = 1.2,
    point.padding = 1.0,
    force = 3.5,
    force_pull = 0.2,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    segment.color = "grey55",
    segment.size = 0.4,
    segment.alpha = 0.8,
    seed = 123,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = celltype_palette) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = x_limits,
    ylim = y_limits,
    clip = "off"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Cell populations",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.6, color = "black"),
    plot.margin = margin(18, 85, 18, 18),
    aspect.ratio = 1
  )

# =========================================================
# 13. Right plots: gene expression on same UMAP
# =========================================================
feature_plots <- lapply(genes_present, function(g) {
  FeaturePlot(
    seu,
    features = g,
    reduction = "umap",
    raster = FALSE,
    order = TRUE,
    cols = c("#fde5f3", "#ff2ca3")
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient(
      low = "#fde5f3",
      high = "#ff2ca3",
      name = "Expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(
      xlim = x_limits,
      ylim = y_limits,
      clip = "off"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = g,
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "black"),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.margin = margin(10, 12, 10, 12),
      aspect.ratio = 1
    )
})

# =========================================================
# 14. Combine plots
# =========================================================
right_panel <- wrap_plots(feature_plots, ncol = 3)

final_umap_plot <- p_labels + right_panel + plot_layout(widths = c(1.25, 1.85))

final_umap_plot

# =========================================================
# 15. Save with larger dimensions so labels are not cut off
# =========================================================
ggsave(
  filename = "pediatric_blood_umap_ggrepel_clearlabels.png",
  plot = final_umap_plot,
  width = 22,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 400,
  limitsize = FALSE
)
```

NO downsampling :

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
library(scales)

set.seed(123)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10", "NECTIN4", "CDH1", "ST8SIA1", "B4GALNT1")

# =========================================================
# 1. Load expression + metadata from QC-filtered object
# =========================================================
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

if (!"cell_type" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  stop("cell_type column not found in colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

# =========================================================
# 2. Use gene symbols as row names
# =========================================================
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name", "name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  stop("No gene name column found in rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc).")
}

gene_names <- as.character(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]])

if (length(gene_names) != nrow(expr_mat)) {
  stop("gene_names length does not match number of rows in expr_mat.")
}

rownames(expr_mat) <- make.unique(gene_names)

# =========================================================
# 3. Keep cells with valid cell type annotation
# =========================================================
keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) & meta$cell_type != ""

meta_use <- meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_use <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

rownames(meta_use) <- colnames(expr_use)
expr_use <- as(expr_use, "dgCMatrix")

cat("Cells used for UMAP:", ncol(expr_use), "\n")

# =========================================================
# 4. Check requested genes
# =========================================================
genes_present <- intersect(genes_to_plot, rownames(expr_use))

if (length(genes_present) == 0) {
  stop("None of the requested genes were found in the matrix.")
}

cat("Genes found:\n")
print(genes_present)

cat("\nGenes missing:\n")
print(setdiff(genes_to_plot, genes_present))

# =========================================================
# 5. Build Seurat object
# =========================================================
seu <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = expr_use,
  meta.data = meta_use,
  project = "Pediatric_Blood_All_Cells"
)

DefaultAssay(seu) <- "RNA"

# Put already-normalized X values into the data slot/layer
seu <- tryCatch(
  {
    SetAssayData(seu, assay = "RNA", layer = "data", new.data = expr_use)
  },
  error = function(e) {
    SetAssayData(seu, assay = "RNA", slot = "data", new.data = expr_use)
  }
)

# =========================================================
# 6. Broad grouped cell-type labels
#    B vs Plasma split
#    Platelets vs Erythroid split
# =========================================================
seu$broad_cell_type <- case_when(
  grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cells",
  grepl("natural killer|NK", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cells",
  grepl("plasma|plasmablast", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Plasma cells",
  grepl("B cell", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B cells",
  grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid cells",
  grepl("dendritic", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic cells",
  grepl("platelet", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Platelets",
  grepl("erythrocyte|RBC", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid cells",
  grepl("precursor|progenitor|HPC", seu$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitors",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

seu$broad_cell_type <- factor(
  seu$broad_cell_type,
  levels = c(
    "T cells",
    "NK cells",
    "B cells",
    "Plasma cells",
    "Myeloid cells",
    "Dendritic cells",
    "Platelets",
    "Erythroid cells",
    "Progenitors",
    "Other"
  )
)

# =========================================================
# 7. Broad cell population colors
# =========================================================
celltype_palette <- c(
  "T cells" = "#6A51A3",
  "NK cells" = "#9ECAE1",
  "B cells" = "#31A354",
  "Plasma cells" = "#66C2A4",
  "Myeloid cells" = "#E67E22",
  "Dendritic cells" = "#A1D99B",
  "Platelets" = "#B39DDB",
  "Erythroid cells" = "#4C78A8",
  "Progenitors" = "#F2C94C",
  "Other" = "#BDBDBD"
)

# =========================================================
# 8. UMAP workflow on ALL cells:
# =========================================================
seu <- FindVariableFeatures(
  seu,
  selection.method = "vst",
  nfeatures = 2000,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- ScaleData(
  seu,
  features = VariableFeatures(seu),
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- RunPCA(
  seu,
  features = VariableFeatures(seu),
  npcs = 30,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- FindNeighbors(
  seu,
  dims = 1:30,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- FindClusters(
  seu,
  resolution = 0.4,
  verbose = FALSE
)

seu <- RunUMAP(
  seu,
  dims = 1:30,
  reduction = "pca",
  reduction.name = "umap",
  verbose = FALSE
)

# =========================================================
# 9. Prepare dataframe for broad cell-type UMAP
# =========================================================
umap_df <- Embeddings(seu, "umap") %>%
  as.data.frame()

colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP_1", "UMAP_2")
umap_df$cell <- rownames(umap_df)
umap_df$broad_cell_type <- seu$broad_cell_type[rownames(umap_df)]

label_df <- umap_df %>%
  group_by(broad_cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    UMAP_1 = median(UMAP_1, na.rm = TRUE),
    UMAP_2 = median(UMAP_2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# =========================================================
# 10. Expand limits so labels do not get cut off
# =========================================================
x_range <- range(umap_df$UMAP_1, na.rm = TRUE)
y_range <- range(umap_df$UMAP_2, na.rm = TRUE)
x_span <- diff(x_range)
y_span <- diff(y_range)

x_limits <- c(x_range[1] - 0.12 * x_span, x_range[2] + 0.38 * x_span)
y_limits <- c(y_range[1] - 0.12 * y_span, y_range[2] + 0.20 * y_span)

# =========================================================
# 11. Left UMAP: broad cell populations with ggrepel labels
# =========================================================
p_labels <- ggplot(
  umap_df,
  aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2, color = broad_cell_type)
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.18, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
    data = label_df,
    aes(
      x = UMAP_1,
      y = UMAP_2,
      label = broad_cell_type,
      color = broad_cell_type
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.92),
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4.6,
    label.size = 0,
    box.padding = 1.2,
    point.padding = 1.0,
    force = 3.5,
    force_pull = 0.2,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    segment.color = "grey55",
    segment.size = 0.4,
    segment.alpha = 0.8,
    seed = 123,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = celltype_palette) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = x_limits,
    ylim = y_limits,
    clip = "off"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Cell populations",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.6, color = "black"),
    plot.margin = margin(18, 85, 18, 18),
    aspect.ratio = 1
  )

# =========================================================
# 12. Right UMAPs: gene expression on same UMAP
# =========================================================
feature_plots <- lapply(genes_present, function(g) {
  FeaturePlot(
    seu,
    features = g,
    reduction = "umap",
    raster = FALSE,
    order = TRUE,
    cols = c("#fde5f3", "#ff2ca3")
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient(
      low = "#fde5f3",
      high = "#ff2ca3",
      name = "Expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(
      xlim = x_limits,
      ylim = y_limits,
      clip = "off"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = g,
      x = "UMAP1",
      y = "UMAP2"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "black"),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.margin = margin(10, 12, 10, 12),
      aspect.ratio = 1
    )
})

# =========================================================
# 13. Combine plots
# =========================================================
right_panel <- wrap_plots(feature_plots, ncol = 3)

final_umap_plot <- p_labels + right_panel + plot_layout(widths = c(1.25, 1.85))

final_umap_plot

# =========================================================
# 14. Save
# =========================================================
ggsave(
  filename = "pediatric_blood_umap_all_cells_no_downsampling.png",
  plot = final_umap_plot,
  width = 18,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300,
  limitsize = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

# Clean memory first
rm(list = setdiff(ls(), c("pbmc_ped_healthy_qc")))
gc()

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

# Main expression matrix
expr_mat <- assay(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc, "X")

# Gene names
gene_col <- intersect(
  c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "symbol", "feature_name"),
  colnames(rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) stop("No gene name column found.")

gene_names <- rowData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc)[[gene_col]]

# Metadata
meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pbmc_ped_healthy_qc))

# Keep valid cells
keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) & meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(meta$patient_id) & meta$patient_id != ""

meta <- meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
expr_mat <- expr_mat[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]

# Broad cell classes
meta <- meta %>%
  mutate(
    cell_class = case_when(
      grepl("T cell|regulatory T|gamma-delta T|mucosal invariant T|alpha-beta", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T cell",
      grepl("natural killer|NK", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NK cell",
      grepl("B cell|plasma|plasmablast", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "B / plasma",
      grepl("monocyte|granulocyte", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Myeloid",
      grepl("dendritic", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Dendritic",
      grepl("erythrocyte|platelet", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Erythroid / platelet",
      grepl("precursor", cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Progenitor",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

# Keep requested genes
gene_idx <- match(genes_to_plot, gene_names)
present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) stop("None of the requested genes were found.")

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

# IMPORTANT:
# Pull only these 2 genes into memory as a small dense matrix
expr_sub <- as.matrix(expr_mat[gene_idx, , drop = FALSE])
rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# Drop the huge backed matrix now
rm(expr_mat)
gc()

cell_classes <- c(
  "B / plasma",
  "Dendritic",
  "Erythroid / platelet",
  "Myeloid",
  "NK cell",
  "Progenitor",
  "T cell",
  "Other"
)
cell_classes <- cell_classes[cell_classes %in% unique(meta$cell_class)]

class_fac <- factor(meta$cell_class, levels = cell_classes)

# Safe averaging: no large matrix slicing inside loops
avg_mat <- t(sapply(seq_len(nrow(expr_sub)), function(i) {
  out <- tapply(expr_sub[i, ], class_fac, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  out[cell_classes]
}))

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)
rownames(avg_mat) <- genes_present
colnames(avg_mat) <- cell_classes

# Rows = broad cell classes
heatmap_mat <- t(avg_mat)
heatmap_mat[is.na(heatmap_mat)] <- 0

# Donor count (d) and cell count (n)
label_df <- meta %>%
  group_by(cell_class) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(patient_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[match(rownames(heatmap_mat), label_df$cell_class), ]

rownames(heatmap_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_class,
  " (d = ", label_df$d, ", n = ", label_df$n, ")"
)

legend_min <- 0
legend_max <- as.numeric(quantile(heatmap_mat, probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE))
legend_mid <- legend_max / 2

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(legend_min, legend_mid, legend_max),
  c("#2166AC", "#D0D0D0", "#B2182B")
)

legend_ticks <- pretty(c(legend_min, legend_max), n = 5)
legend_ticks <- legend_ticks[legend_ticks >= legend_min & legend_ticks <= legend_max]

ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,
  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = NA),

  width = unit(3.2, "cm"),
  height = unit(10.5, "cm"),

  row_names_side = "left",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"),
  row_names_max_width = unit(12, "cm"),
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"),

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)\n",
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    at = legend_ticks,
    labels = round(legend_ticks, 2),
    legend_height = unit(60, "mm"),
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold")
  ),

  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    val <- heatmap_mat[i, j]
    lab <- if (is.na(val) || val < 0.005) "0" else sprintf("%.2f", val)
    grid.text(
      lab,
      x, y,
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 13, fontface = "bold", col = "black")
    )
  }
)

png(
  "pediatric_healthy_heatmap_broad_classes_quantile99_cd24_siglec10.png",
  width = 2800,
  height = 2200,
  res = 300
)
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()
```
